full_text:
Jin Xiang 靳詳
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jin Xiang (靳詳). Tried to persuade his old friend Hao Zhao to defect, Zhao threatened to shoot him. Jin Xiang was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
